data.thought:
Investigated GitHub Actions build failure where `home/` and `var/` directories were missing from the build context.
- **Action:** Created `.gitkeep` files in user-space subdirectories.
- **Result:** Build context integrity restored for remote runners.

data.thought:
Refactored journaling to be API-native, programmatically parseable, and Linux-native.
- **Action:** Created `var/lib/mios/memory/journal/v1.jsonl` as the machine-native episodic store.
- **Action:** Created `tools/journal-sync.py` to migrate legacy Markdown to JSONL.
- **Action:** Documented `specs/core/2026-04-27-Artifact-COR-006-Linux-Native-Memory-Standards.md`.
- **Result:** Cognitive history is now structured for high-fidelity AI API ingestion while adhering to Linux FHS (`var/lib`).

- **Thought:** Refactored journaling to be API-native, programmatically parseable, and Linux-native.

data.thought: Addressed build failure in 99-postcheck.sh by ensuring tool versions and presence. Finalized ENG-008 and integrated SBOM generation.
actions: Switched NVIDIA toolkit repo to experimental (1.18+)
Verified cockpit-bridge and nvidia-container-toolkit in PACKAGES.md
Added build-verbose target to Justfile
Implemented 90-generate-sbom.sh
Updated prepare-bootstrap-native.sh for SBOMs
learnings: 99-postcheck.sh enforces strict security invariants; NVIDIA toolkit versioning is critical for CDI.
data.result: Build path cleared; v0.1.3 infrastructure complete.

data.thought: Resolved orchestrator build failure by updating manifest paths. Fixed cleanup runtime error.
actions: Updated mios-build-local.ps1 and 23 other files with new PACKAGES.md path
Fixed duplicate markers in MiOS-Omni-Todo.html
Finalized session cleanup
learnings: File renames require comprehensive global path updates across both Linux and Windows tooling.
data.result: Orchestrator pathing corrected; build flow restored.

data.thought: Streamlined Windows build orchestrator by removing redundant interactive prompts and improving safety of deployment patterns. Ensured environment variable inheritance from bootstrap wrapper.
actions: Modified mios-build-local.ps1 to inherit MIOS_USER, MIOS_PASSWORD, MIOS_HOSTNAME
Added support for MIOS_WORKFLOW, MIOS_TARGETS, MIOS_SKIP_DEPLOY, MIOS_FORCE_DEPLOY
Implemented safety prompts for destructive WSL and Hyper-V operations
Corrected hardcoded hostname bug in non-custom workflows
learnings: Multi-level interactive wrappers (bootstrap -> install -> build) require strict env-var passing to remain efficient.
data.result: Build orchestrator optimized; redundant prompts eliminated; destructive deployments guarded.

data.thought: Implemented robust secure storage and masking engine for user-defined variables and secrets. Centralized storage with NTFS ACL enforcement and added automatic masking to all console and audit logs.
actions: Moved secrets file to restricted AppData subfolder in bootstrap.ps1
Implemented Set-SecureACL to enforce user-only access to .env directory
Implemented Global:MiOS_MaskList and Format-Masked engine in mios-build-local.ps1
Updated all UI helpers to automatically mask registered secrets
Added automatic secret registration from environment and user prompts
learnings: Regex-based masking in PowerShell requires careful escaping of special characters like $ in passwords.
NTFS ACL rule protection is necessary to prevent inherited permissions from leaking secret access.
data.result: Security posture hardened; secrets stored securely and masked in all transient build steps.

data.thought: Diagnosed and resolved build failure with exit code 2. The cause was the combination of set -euo pipefail and ls with non-matching globs in the build summary block, which triggered an immediate script exit. Refactored all counting logic to use robust array-based methods.
actions: Identified exit code 2 root cause in automation/build.sh
Refactored render_status_card to use safe array-based file counting
Refactored final summary block to avoid pipefail triggers from ls
Verified tools and other automation scripts for similar patterns
learnings: When using pipefail, avoid commands like ls that exit non-zero for empty/expected non-matches.
Array assignment and size checking is the most robust way to count files in strict Bash scripts.
data.result: Build orchestrator fully stabilized; 100uccess rate restored for build summary reporting.

data.thought: Performed global emoji removal and implemented terminal-agnostic ASCII progress bars for builds. Removed Unicode symbols to ensure clean rendering in all terminal environments, especially during live building on Windows.
actions: Executed tools/remove-emojis.py for global Unicode-to-ASCII replacement
Implemented robust, dynamic ASCII progress bar in automation/build.sh
Updated mios-build-local.ps1 to support live terminal progress and MIOS_LIVE_BUILD indicator
Verified complete ASCII compliance in MiOS-Omni-Todo.html
learnings: Live building inside containers on Windows requires explicit forcing of terminal-style progress if native UI bars are obscured.
Automated global emoji removal requires a controlled mapping to maintain semantic clarity (e.g. checkmarks to [OK]).
data.result: Project is now emoji-free and supports platform-agnostic live build progress.

data.thought: Implemented a project-wide Global Variable Registry and Propagator. This system centralizes all changing variables (images, users, paths) into a single SSoT and automatically updates all subscribers via tracking anchors.
actions: Created config/registry.toml as the Single Source of Truth
Created tools/propagate.py for automated variable synchronization
Added @track anchors to Justfile, Containerfile, image-versions.yml, mios-build-local.ps1, etc.
Optimized propagate.py with 1MB file limit and @track pre-filtering for maximum speed
Verified project-wide variable consistency via dry-run and apply modes
learnings: Regex scanning on large JSON/manifest files requires pre-filtering for specific markers to avoid TLE/timeouts.
Centralizing image digests and versions into a registry enables much faster release cycles and re-tagging.
data.result: Global Variable Registry implemented and verified; project-wide synchronization now automated.
